name: WatchGuard EDR
description: Integrates with WatchGuard Endpoint Security Management API v1 for device management, threat detection, endpoint isolation, and on-demand scanning

actions.name: List Devices
actions.description: Retrieve the list of managed endpoint devices in the account

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The WatchGuard Cloud account ID

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of devices to return

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination

parameters.name: platform_id
parameters.description: Filter by platform (windows, macos, linux, android)

actions.name: Get Device Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific managed device

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The WatchGuard Cloud account ID

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the device

actions.name: Isolate Device
actions.description: Isolate a device from the network to prevent spread of threats and data exfiltration

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The WatchGuard Cloud account ID

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the device to isolate

actions.name: Release Device from Isolation
actions.description: Remove network isolation from a previously isolated device

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The WatchGuard Cloud account ID

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the device to release

actions.name: Scan Device
actions.description: Initiate an on-demand endpoint scan on a specific device

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The WatchGuard Cloud account ID

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the device to scan

actions.name: List Threats
actions.description: Retrieve the list of detected threats across managed devices

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The WatchGuard Cloud account ID

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of threats to return

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip

actions.name: Get Task Details
actions.description: Retrieve the status and details of a background task (scan, isolation, etc.)

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The WatchGuard Cloud account ID

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of task to retrieve

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the task

actions.name: List Security Events
actions.description: Retrieve security events and detections from managed endpoints

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The WatchGuard Cloud account ID

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date for event query (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date for event query (ISO 8601)
